steps.title: Identify what the data must show
steps.content: The text says the degree of the spoiler-vs-no-spoiler enjoyment gap varied across stories. The example must pick a pair where one story's gap is much larger than the other's — that best illustrates variation in the size of the effect.

steps.title: Match the data
steps.content:
From the graph, "Owl Creek Bridge" shows a notably larger spoiler-vs-unspoiled gap than "A Chess Problem," making the variation in effect size clear. That's (A).

(B), (C), and (D) pair stories whose gaps are too similar to show the contrast cleanly.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
